signals.raw:
Fed Chair Powell Confirms Tariffs Driving Goods Inflation, Expects Peak in Q1 2026 Absent Further Rounds; Economy 'Very Unusual' with Weakening Labor Market** | YES | HIGH

Powell stated in recent remarks that U.S. goods inflation—elevated due to tariffs—is a "one-time price increase" expected to peak around Q1 2026 if no additional tariffs occur, while inflation excluding tariff-affected goods is
